description: Preliminary layout anchored to the selected Galway ERA5 reference location and arranged using feasibility-stage spacing assumptions prior to constraint screening or wake-driven refinement.
origin_note: The first-pass layout origin was tied to the selected Galway ERA5 screening point to maintain consistency between site screening and baseline layout development.
limitations: No terrain or flow-acceleration modelling applied yet
Layout is intended as a baseline geometry for preliminary wake modelling
